user.title: Connect to Hydros
user.description: Enter the credentials used for the Hydros web portal.

collectives.title: Select collectives
collectives.description: Choose one or more collectives to expose in Home Assistant.

error.cannot_connect: Unable to reach the Hydros service.

abort.no_collectives: No collectives available for this account.

init.title: Remote control
init.description: Enable or disable Hydros remote control from Home Assistant.

disclaimer.title: Safety disclaimer
disclaimer.description:
⚠️ Always use the Hydros native application for critical control.

Network outages, cloud/API changes, software defects, and misconfiguration (such as a problematic automation) can cause unsafe behavior. The native application has built-in safeguards that this integration cannot replicate.

Set timeouts on all your Hydros modes (in the mode configuration within the Hydros app) so the default mode is restored automatically if a command is missed.

By enabling remote control, you acknowledge these risks and accept full responsibility.

data.accept_remote_control_disclaimer: I understand and accept the risks

error.ack_required: You must accept the disclaimer to enable remote control.
